description: Stud center positions and bracket configurations for mounting brackets.
notes: Brackets will be centered on stud positions
tongue_length is the stem that extends into the shelf (for router inset)

right_wall.description: Right/West wall (x=48), studs listed by Y-position from door

left_wall.description: Left/East wall (x=0), studs listed by Y-position from door

back_wall.description: Back/South wall (y=49), studs listed by X-position from left corner, shifted +1.8 right

back_shelf_side_brackets.description: Side support brackets for back shelves, mounted to left/right walls
back_shelf_side_brackets.note: y_position is 12.8 inches from back wall (49 - 12.8 = 36.2), shifted 1.8 forward to avoid back wall brackets

back_shelf_corner_brackets.description: Corner brackets for back shelves, screwed into hidden corner studs for extra stability
